title: Dublin Men (The Rocky Road To Dublin)
content:
A Dublin man will frown when he
        Hears a tale of villainy;
        But when a kindness you relate,
        He swings and whistles on the gate.
meaning:
"Dublin Men (The Rocky Road To Dublin)" is a quintessential example of James Stephens's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
